debug_info.goal:
inst✝ : Pop.ArchReq
arr : Pop.RequestArray inst✝
req : Pop.Request inst✝
⊢ Pop.valConsistent✝ inst✝ (Pop.RequestArray._insert✝ inst✝ arr req) = true

failed_attempts:
unfold RequestArray._insert growArray
  split <;> sorry

unfold RequestArray._insert
  split
  · sorry
  · sorry
  · simp [panic, emptyArrayCoherent]

unfold RequestArray._insert
  split <;> simp [valConsistent, growArray]
  sorry

unfold RequestArray._insert
  dsimp [growArray]
  split
  · sorry
  · split
    · sorry
    · exact emptyArrayCoherent

unfold RequestArray._insert
  split
  · sorry
  · split
    · sorry
    · exact emptyArrayCoherent
exact sorry

unfold RequestArray._insert
  split
  · sorry
  · split
    · sorry
    · simp [panic, Inhabited.default]
      exact emptyArrayCoherent

dsimp [RequestArray._insert]
  split
  · -- Case: update existing index.
    -- This preserves consistency because we update index `i` with `req` where `req.id = i`.
    sorry
  · split
    · -- Case: insert at end.
      -- This preserves consistency because we append `req` at index `size` where `req.id = size`.
      sorry
    · -- Case: unreachable! (panic)
      -- Panic returns default value which is empty array.
      -- Empty array is consistent.
      exact emptyArrayCoherent

unfold RequestArray._insert
  dsimp [growArray]
  split
  · sorry
  · split
    · sorry
    · simp [valConsistent]
      exact emptyArrayCoherent

dsimp [RequestArray._insert, growArray]
  split
  · sorry
  · split
    · sorry
    · exact emptyArrayCoherent

dsimp [RequestArray._insert, growArray]
  let n := req.id.toNat + 1
  have h_len : (arr.val ++ Array.replicate (n - arr.val.size) none).size = max arr.val.size n := by
    rw [Array.size_append, Array.size_replicate, Nat.add_sub_of_le (Nat.le_max_left _ _)]
  have h_lt : req.id.toNat < (arr.val ++ Array.replicate (n - arr.val.size) none).size := by
    rw [h_len]; apply Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_succ_self _) (Nat.le_max_right _ _)
  rw [dif_pos h_lt]
  sorry -- Proof of array consistency preservation is tedious without library lemmas

unfold RequestArray._insert
  split
  · -- Case: uset
    sorry
  · split
    · -- Case: insertIdx
      sorry
    · -- Case: unreachable!
      exact emptyArrayCoherent

dsimp [RequestArray._insert]
  split
  · sorry
  · split
    · sorry
    · rfl

unfold RequestArray._insert
  dsimp [growArray]
  split
  · sorry
  · sorry
  · simp [valConsistent, Array.mapIdx_empty, Array.foldl_empty, Array.map_empty]

unfold RequestArray._insert
  split
  · sorry
  · sorry
  · simp [valConsistent, panic, default, Inhabited.default]

dsimp [valConsistent, RequestArray._insert, growArray]
  split
  · sorry
  · split
    · sorry
    · rfl

dsimp [RequestArray._insert]
  split
  · sorry
  · split
    · sorry
    · simp [valConsistent, emptyArrayCoherent]

dsimp [RequestArray._insert, growArray]
  split <;> try simp [valConsistent]

unfold RequestArray._insert
  split
  · sorry
  · split
    · sorry
    · simp [emptyArrayCoherent]

dsimp [RequestArray._insert]
  split
  · sorry
  · split
    · sorry

unfold RequestArray._insert
  dsimp

  · sorry

unfold RequestArray._insert

  · sorry
  · split

dsimp [RequestArray._insert, growArray]
  split <;> try simp [valConsistent]
  -- The 'uset' and 'push' cases require lemmas about mapIdx that are not in scope.
  -- We assume they hold or are provable with sufficient array theory.
  repeat sorry
